en_title: Spider-Man: Brand New Day Runtime Revealed, And It's One of The Longest Marvel Films Ever
cn_title: 《蜘蛛侠：崭新一日》片长曝光，成最长蜘蛛侠电影
subtitle: 蜘蛛侠史上最长
opus_summary: AMC院线透露《蜘蛛侠：崭新一日》片长150分钟，成最长蜘蛛侠电影，比《英雄无归》长2分钟，在MCU中仅短于《永恒族》《黑豹》和《终局之战》。

paragraphs.en: AMC Theatres has revealed the runtime of Spider-Man: Brand New Day — which is set to be the longest Spidey film ever.
paragraphs.cn: AMC院线透露了《蜘蛛侠：崭新一日》的片长——它将成为史上最长的蜘蛛侠电影。

paragraphs.en: At 150 minutes — that's two hours and 30 minutes total — the film will also weigh in as longer than almost every other Marvel Cinematic Universe movie. But, considering the number of characters and plotlines in the film, perhaps this isn't a surprise.
paragraphs.cn: 150分钟（即2小时30分钟）的片长，也让该片比漫威电影宇宙中几乎所有其他电影都要长。不过，考虑到片中角色和故事线的数量，这或许并不令人意外。

paragraphs.en: Tom Holland's fourth solo outing as the webslinger is also longer than any Spidey film starring Tobey Maguire or Andrew Garfield — and two minutes longer than Holland's own longest Spider-Man movie to date, Spider-Man No Way Home, which featured all three heroes together.
paragraphs.cn: 汤姆·霍兰德的第四次蜘蛛侠单人冒险，也比托比·马奎尔或安德鲁·加菲尔德主演的任何蜘蛛侠电影都要长——甚至比霍兰德目前最长的蜘蛛侠电影《蜘蛛侠：英雄无归》（三位英雄同框）还长2分钟。

paragraphs.en: The only Marvel films longer than Brand New Day to date are Eternals (which felt long at 156 minutes), Black Panther (161 minutes) and the climactic Avengers: Endgame (which at 181 minutes just tips over the 3-hour mark).
paragraphs.cn: 目前比《崭新一日》更长的漫威电影只有《永恒族》（156分钟，确实感觉很长）、《黑豹》（161分钟）和终局之作《复仇者联盟4：终局之战》（181分钟，刚好超过3小时）。

paragraphs.en: Spider-Man: Brand New Day has plenty to do — which may account for its lengthy runtime. The film's main action picks up years after we last saw Peter Parker, who is now living alone and fighting the good fight in New York against a rogues' gallery of villains.
paragraphs.cn: 《蜘蛛侠：崭新一日》要讲的内容很多——这或许解释了其冗长的片长。影片主要剧情发生在我们上次见到彼得·帕克多年之后，他现在独自生活，在纽约与一众反派恶棍战斗。

paragraphs.en: Foes in the film include Michael Mando's Scorpion, back from Spider-Man: Homecoming, Marvin Jones III's Tombstone, Boomerang (who fans think is being played by Eman Esfandi , making him the secret identity of MJ's new boyfriend), Tarantula, ninja cult The Hand, a rampant version of Mark Ruffalo's Hulk, whoever Sadie Sink's playing (who seems to at least initially be framed as an enemy) and the Department of Damage Control (who seem to initially be framed as friendly).
paragraphs.cn: 片中的敌人包括迈克尔·曼多的蝎人（来自《蜘蛛侠：英雄归来》）、马文·琼斯三世的墓碑、回旋镖（粉丝认为由Eman Esfandi饰演，是MJ新男友的秘密身份）、狼蛛、忍者组织手合会、马克·鲁弗洛的浩克狂暴版、萨迪·辛克饰演的神秘角色（至少最初被设定为敌人），以及损害控制部（最初似乎被设定为友好方）。

paragraphs.en: That's quite a lot for Spider-Man to be getting on with, but then there's also the fact that Peter himself seems to be going through some kind of physical metamorphosis, there's his reluctant partnership with Jon Bernthal's The Punisher to sort out, and the fact he still is keeping an eye on Zendaya's MJ and Jacob Batalon's Ned, even though they no longer know who he is. Phew.
paragraphs.cn: 蜘蛛侠要应付的事情已经够多了，但还有彼得自己似乎正在经历某种身体变异，他还要处理与乔·博恩瑟的惩罚者不情愿的合作关系，以及他仍在暗中关注赞达亚的MJ和雅各布·巴塔隆的内德——尽管他们已不再记得他是谁。唉。

paragraphs.en: How this will all weave together remains to be seen — though there is at least not very long left until we get to see it ourselves, when the film arrives in theaters on July 31. A second trailer for the movie also seems imminent, after the majority of it leaked over the weekend .
paragraphs.cn: 这一切将如何交织在一起还有待观察——不过至少我们很快就能亲眼看到了，影片将于7月31日上映。第二支预告片似乎也即将发布，因为其大部分内容已在周末泄露。

paragraphs.en: Tom Phillips is IGN's News Editor. You can reach Tom at tom_phillips@ign.com or find him on Bluesky
paragraphs.cn: Tom Phillips是IGN的新闻编辑。可通过tom_phillips@ign.com联系他，或在Bluesky上找到他。
